name: testCancelAddingFraudControlToBusinessUnit
description: Add Fraud Control to Business Unit with Cancel buttonAdd Fraud Control to Business Unit with 'Cross'Add Fraud Control to Business Unit with ESC
descriptionHtml: Add Fraud Control to Business Unit with Cancel buttonAdd Fraud Control to Business Unit with 'Cross'Add Fraud Control to Business Unit with ESC

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Add Fraud Control to Business Unit with Cancel buttonAdd Fraud Control to Business Unit with 'Cross'Add Fraud Control to Business Unit with ESC

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select '0723.145040 company to bend Fraud Control' company using filter
Select 'Business unit 0723.145040' business unit using filter
Verify that due to click Cancel button Fraud Control hasn't been added
Click on the 'Close' icon to close form
Verify that due to click Cross icon Fraud Control hasn't been added
Verify that due to press ESC keyboard button Fraud Control hasn't been added
